doctor.title: Doctor Portal
doctor.subtitle: Access your consultation dashboard
doctor.loginOnly: Doctor accounts are created by administrators

profile.title: Your Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your account information
profile.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.subtitle: Manage doctors and platform settings
admin.confirmDeactivate: Are you sure you want to deactivate this doctor? They will not be able to log in.
admin.confirmReactivate: Are you sure you want to reactivate this doctor?
admin.confirmDelete: This action cannot be undone. The doctor account and all associated data will be permanently deleted.
admin.cannotDeleteActive: Cannot delete doctor with active consultations
admin.queueTypeGroupDesc: Sees unassigned cases from the pool
admin.queueTypeIndividualDesc: Sees only cases assigned to them
admin.queueTypeHybridDesc: Sees both pool and assigned cases
admin.patientsSubtitle: All registered patients on the platform
admin.confirmDeactivatePatient: Are you sure you want to deactivate this patient? They will not be able to log in.
admin.confirmReactivatePatient: Are you sure you want to reactivate this patient?
admin.confirmDeletePatient: This action cannot be undone. The patient account and all associated data will be permanently deleted.
admin.cannotDeleteActivePatient: Cannot delete patient with active consultations

forgotPassword.title: Reset Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgotPassword.dialogDescription: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.checkInbox: Check your inbox for the password reset link.
forgotPassword.sentResetLink: We've sent you a password reset link.
forgotPassword.clickLinkInEmail: Click the link in the email to reset your password.

resetPassword.title: Set New Password
resetPassword.successDescription: You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been successfully changed.
resetPassword.requestNewLink: Please request a new password reset link.

errors.weakPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
errors.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.
errors.doctorsOnly: This portal is for doctors only.
